text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: No way... We still can't go running yet? It's just been workouts day after day... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: What's the matter? What's with all the long faces?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The nonstop raining over the past few days has
finally come to a stop. But the deluge was so
heavy that the drainage systems can't keep up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the academy assigned all available staff to
help restore the track back to its former state,
whether it's ready for use or not remains
debatable.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Over here, everyone! Gather around! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek comes into view leading a group of
children on a tour of the academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, the little ones have come out to play! We
gotta look lively, folks!

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text: Hey, why isn't anybody running outside?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I'm so sorry, my dears. You see, we can't run
out there with all the mud.

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text:
Aww man! But I wanna see!
Please run!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's that? You wanna see us in action? Just
leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Feast your eyes, boys and girls, on the
swiftest runner 'round these parts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One starts to run on the dirt track swamped
with mud, but it isn't long before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Skid!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yowch! I got too excited and totally
face-planted!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Inari, sweetheart, are you okay?! Don't push
yourself so hard!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's take it easy today... yeah?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What?! And after I just ate dirt like that? Sorry,
but no can do!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know today's just a normal day of training,
meaning it's necessary to pace myself.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But look at the hope in the little ones' eyes!
You're really gonna ask me to spoil my
reputation?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Inari, dear...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Besides, we're all dying to go running.
Right, girls?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We're gonna let loose and sprint at full
speed!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, and there they go... It looks like there's
no stopping them now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, can I ask you to look after the
Umamusume? I'm worried I can't watch over
everyone by myself... It'd be great if you could
give them some guidance.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I agree. If they run too fast, someone might get
hurt.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa whoa, you two can't be serious! And I
already got everyone so fired up!
choice_data_list: We'll keep the mood high by cheering.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okaay, I can get behind that! I want y'all to cheer
until your voices go hoarse!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, everyone, let's make some noise! Hoot
and holler those lousy rain clouds away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The children joyfully whoop and cheer as the
boisterous Umamusume run about.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, are you sure? What if they trip and fall?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're saying we can race despite the weather?
You sure you don't want us to play it just a little
safe?
choice_data_list: It's fine, run all you want!
It's fine, run all you want!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whatever you say... All right, I'm gonna show you
the run of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, you're going stupid fast! Now this is what
I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it's easier to achieve high speeds on the soft,
dirt track, their breakneck racing is met with
great enthusiasm from the children!
